Passed enforced test review-ldiskfs-dne-arm on RHEL 8.7/aarch64, RHEL 8.8/x86_64 uploaded by Trevis Autotest from trevis-108vm17: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/fee03421-a5db-4492-95df-1ee4b318e34b ran 5 tests.

Patch Set 1:

Maybe add a lctl get_param option instead? This seems to be a hammer approach

Patch Set 1:

> Maybe add a lctl get_param option instead? This seems to be a
 > hammer approach

I'm not sure what you are asking?  There *is* a tunable parameter to disable the new stats header fields, if this is breaking collectd parsing.  It can be accessed with:

 # lctl get_param enable_stats_header
 # lctl set_param enable_stats_header=0

Patch Set 1:

Sorry I mean that this affects ALL stats.

Patch Set 1:

> Sorry I mean that this affects ALL stats.

I still don't understand what you are getting at. 

Yes, this new parameter enables/disabled the new "start_time" and "elapsed_time" field in the header of the stats files, but it defaults to "on" so the net result is a no-op compared to 2.15 when these fields were first added. 

However, we had problems with old collectd scrapers because of the new fields in the header, so it makes sense to disable them in all of the places they were added. I'm not sure what else you are expecting here?  I'm not going to add a separate tunable for each stats file to allow enabling and disabling theses fields. This is intended as a temporary workaround on systems until collectd is updated to a newer version (which supports these fields).
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as 2a498f06ccc975fb57214961db6e20a6c1cc2ec7 by Oleg Drokin

parents.subject: LU-16341 tests: skip sanity-quota/test_14 for old MDS

commit.subject: LU-17005 obdclass: allow stats header to be disabled
commit.message:
LU-17005 obdclass: allow stats header to be disabled

Add a global "enable_stats_header" tunable parameter that can be
set to enable/disable the "start_time" and "elapsed_time" fields
in the standard lprocfs "stats" files.

Default to enabled, since this landed shortly after v2_14_0.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: 5efb892396e3 ("LU-11407 obdclass: add start time to stats files")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I460b957447bfb83e6d4fd7395b79ce994f3ebbe5
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/51823
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Feng Lei <flei@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Nathaniel Clark <nclark@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
